description: NotchNook v2 — Full-featured Dynamic Island for macOS with themes, system indicators, widget drawer, and deep customization

userStories.title: Notch Detection & Window Placement
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to detect my MacBook's hardware notch and place an overlay precisely over it.
acceptanceCriteria: Places NSPanel overlay exactly over the hardware notch
Falls back to centered virtual pill on non-notch Macs
Handles multiple displays — one overlay per screen
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1. ScreenDetector.swift handles notch detection.

userStories.title: Expand/Collapse Animation
userStories.description: As a user, I want the notch to smoothly expand and collapse with spring animations.
acceptanceCriteria: Collapsed state matches hardware notch dimensions
Expanded state is configurable width (400-800pt) x 200pt
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1. NotchPanel + NotchShape + NotchWindowManager.

userStories.title: Activation Triggers
userStories.description: As a user, I want to choose how to activate the notch — hover, click, or keyboard shortcut.
acceptanceCriteria: Hover activation with configurable dwell delay
Grace period on mouse exit before collapsing
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1. ActivationTrigger enum in NotchState.swift.

userStories.title: Theme System
userStories.description: As a user, I want to choose between dark, translucent, and Liquid Glass themes so the notch matches my aesthetic preferences.
acceptanceCriteria: Solid dark theme: pure black background matching hardware notch
Translucent dark theme: NSVisualEffectView with .popover material + dark tint overlay
Liquid Glass theme: frosted glass with subtle color tinting from desktop wallpaper
Theme selection in Settings > Appearance tab
Smooth crossfade between themes when changed
NotchRootView reads theme from UserDefaults and applies correct background
userStories.notes: ThemeMode enum in NotchState.swift. Appearance tab in SettingsView. NotchRootView uses switch on themeMode for background.

userStories.title: Non-Notch Mac Support
userStories.description: As a user on a Mac without a notch, I want a virtual pill that behaves identically to the notch overlay.
acceptanceCriteria: Virtual pill at top-center (180pt x menu bar height)
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1. ScreenDetector handles non-notch fallback.

userStories.title: Now Playing Widget (Expanded)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see and control the currently playing track when I expand the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows album art, track title, artist name
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1. MediaPlayerWidget.swift.

userStories.title: Collapsed Media Indicator
userStories.description: As a user, I want subtle indicators when music is playing and the notch is collapsed.
acceptanceCriteria: Album art peek on collapsed notch
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1. CollapsedMediaIndicator.swift.

userStories.title: Apple Music & Spotify Inline Previews
userStories.description: As a user, I want richer previews for Apple Music and Spotify showing playlist context and up-next.
acceptanceCriteria: Detects Apple Music / Spotify via bundle ID from MediaRemote client
Shows 'Up Next' track name below current track when available
Falls back gracefully to standard view for other apps
userStories.notes: Added albumName to NowPlayingInfo, isRichMediaApp computed property. MediaPlayerWidget shows album for Apple Music/Spotify.

userStories.title: YouTube & Video Background Playback Controls
userStories.description: As a user watching video in a browser, I want media controls in the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows video title and source app icon
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1. MediaRemote already works for browser media.

userStories.title: Volume HUD
userStories.description: As a user, I want volume changes to appear as a sleek slider in the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Monitors system volume via CoreAudio AudioObjectAddPropertyListenerBlock
Displays horizontal slider with speaker icon and percentage
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1. HUDService + HUDOverlayView.

userStories.title: Brightness HUD
userStories.description: As a user, I want brightness changes to appear in the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Monitors display brightness via IOKit adaptive polling
Displays horizontal slider with sun icon and percentage
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1. HUDService handles brightness.

userStories.title: Native HUD Suppression
userStories.description: As a user, I want the option to suppress the default macOS volume/brightness HUD.
acceptanceCriteria: Graceful fallback if Accessibility permission not granted
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1.

userStories.title: Battery & Charging Status Indicator
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see battery percentage and charging state in the collapsed notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows battery percentage as small text on collapsed notch
Charging bolt icon when plugged in
Uses IOPSCopyPowerSourcesInfo / IOPSCopyPowerSourcesList for battery data
userStories.notes: BatteryService polls every 30s via IOPSCopyPowerSourcesInfo. BatteryIndicator in collapsed notch with color coding and pulse animation.

userStories.title: Privacy Indicators (Camera/Mic In Use)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see when my camera or microphone is active as colored dots in the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Green dot for camera active, orange dot for microphone active
Uses CoreMediaIO / AVCaptureDevice for camera detection
Uses AudioObjectGetPropertyData on input device for mic detection
Dots appear at the edge of the collapsed notch
userStories.notes: PrivacyService polls camera/mic every 2s. Green/orange dots in collapsed notch. collapsedIndicators ViewBuilder in NotchRootView.

userStories.title: Focus Mode Indicator
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my active Focus Mode name/icon in the collapsed notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows Focus Mode name as small label
Moon icon for Do Not Disturb
Appears/disappears with animation when Focus Mode toggles
userStories.notes: FocusService.swift detects DND via DistributedNotificationCenter + UserDefaults. Purple moon icon in collapsedIndicators.

userStories.title: Screen Recording Indicator
userStories.description: As a user, I want a visible indicator when my screen is being recorded.
acceptanceCriteria: Red recording dot when screen capture is active
Detects via CGDisplayStreamCreate or SCC framework presence check
Shows recording app name on expand
userStories.notes: Integrated into PrivacyService. Detects recording apps + screencaptured daemon. Pulsing red dot in PrivacyIndicatorView.

userStories.title: Collapsed Indicator Layout Manager
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a layout system to arrange multiple collapsed indicators (battery, privacy dots, focus, recording) without overlapping.
acceptanceCriteria: CollapsedIndicatorBar view arranges indicators left-to-right within collapsed notch bounds
Indicators have priority ordering (privacy > recording > battery > focus)
Gracefully hides lower-priority indicators if space is insufficient
Integrated into NotchRootView for collapsed state
userStories.notes: CollapsedIndicatorBar.swift with priority ordering and compact mode. Replaces inline collapsedIndicators in NotchRootView.

userStories.title: Widget Drawer Architecture
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a widget system that allows multiple widgets to be registered, arranged, and displayed in the expanded notch.
acceptanceCriteria: WidgetProtocol with id, name, icon, view, size (small/medium/large)
WidgetRegistry manages available widgets and user-selected arrangement
Expanded notch shows a scrollable grid/list of active widgets
Widgets can be reordered in Settings
Widget state persists across launches via UserDefaults
userStories.notes: NotchWidget protocol + WidgetRegistry + WidgetDrawerView. Registry persists enabled IDs and order via UserDefaults.

userStories.title: Calendar Widget
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my upcoming events in the notch widget drawer.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows next 3 upcoming events from EventKit (EKEventStore)
Displays event title, time, and calendar color
'In X minutes' relative time for imminent events
Requests calendar access on first use
userStories.notes: CalendarService with EKEventStore, CalendarWidget with color bars and relative time. Registered in WidgetRegistry.

userStories.title: Timer / Stopwatch Widget
userStories.description: As a user, I want a timer and stopwatch accessible from the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Countdown timer with preset buttons (1m, 5m, 10m, 25m) and custom entry
Timer completion notification sound + notch animation
Running timer shows remaining time in collapsed notch
userStories.notes: TimerService with countdown/stopwatch modes, presets, laps, completion sound. Registered in WidgetRegistry.

userStories.title: Clipboard History Widget
userStories.description: As a user, I want to access my recent clipboard items from the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Monitors NSPasteboard.general for changes via polling
Stores last 20 clipboard entries (text, images, file URLs)
Click to re-copy an item to clipboard
userStories.notes: ClipboardService polls NSPasteboard, stores 20 entries. Widget has search and click-to-copy.

userStories.title: Shortcuts Widget
userStories.description: As a user, I want to trigger my favorite Shortcuts directly from the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows running indicator and success/failure result
userStories.notes: ShortcutsService uses /usr/bin/shortcuts CLI. Widget shows favorites grid with run status.

userStories.title: Notes Quick Capture Widget
userStories.description: As a user, I want to quickly jot down a note from the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Text field for quick note entry
Saves to clipboard or text file
Keyboard shortcut to focus note field when expanded
Shows last 3 recent notes as quick-recall list
userStories.notes: NotesWidget with text field, clipboard copy on submit, recent notes persisted in UserDefaults.

userStories.title: Webcam Mirror Widget
userStories.description: As a user, I want a quick webcam preview in the notch before joining a video call.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows live preview in a small rounded rect
Auto-stops capture when widget is hidden/collapsed
userStories.notes: WebcamWidget with AVCaptureSession, low preset, auto-stop on disappear. NSCameraUsageDescription added.

userStories.title: Color Picker Widget
userStories.description: As a user (designer/developer), I want a quick color picker accessible from the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: NSColorSampler integration for screen color picking
Shows picked color swatch, hex value, RGB values
Click to copy hex/RGB to clipboard
userStories.notes: NSColorSampler integration, hex/RGB copy, 10-color history.

userStories.title: Unit/Currency Converter Widget
userStories.description: As a user, I want a quick converter for units and currency in the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Category selector: length, weight, temperature, currency
Input field with source unit, output field with target unit
userStories.notes: Length/weight/temperature converter with swap and live display.

userStories.title: System Stats Widget
userStories.description: As a power user, I want to see system resource usage in the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: CPU usage percentage with mini bar chart
userStories.notes: SystemStatsService with host_statistics/host_statistics64. Widget shows CPU bar chart and memory pressure bar.

userStories.title: Incoming Call Display
userStories.description: As a user, I want incoming FaceTime/phone calls to show as a live activity in the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Detects incoming calls via CallKit or TelephonyUtilities private framework
Smooth expand animation from collapsed state
Auto-dismisses if call is answered or declined elsewhere
Falls back to notification-style display if call detection unavailable
userStories.notes: CallService monitors DistributedNotificationCenter for FaceTime calls. IncomingCallView with accept/decline buttons.

userStories.title: AirDrop Send/Receive Indicator
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see AirDrop transfer progress in the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Detects AirDrop activity via Sharing framework
Shows transfer progress bar, file name, and sender/receiver
userStories.notes: AirDropService monitors Downloads folder for new files. AirDropIndicatorView shows transfer direction and filename.

userStories.title: Quick AirDrop from Notch
userStories.description: As a user, I want to AirDrop files by dragging them to the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: After file drop, show 'AirDrop' as an action option
userStories.notes: Added AirDropAction struct using NSSharingService(.sendViaAirDrop) as built-in drop action.

userStories.title: Drag-and-Drop File Tray
userStories.description: As a user, I want to drag files onto the notch to quickly process them.
acceptanceCriteria: Drag over notch expands into drop zone
Built-in actions: Compress Image, OCR Text Extraction
Custom actions: Shortcuts, shell scripts, pipelines
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1. DropActionService + DropZoneView + DropActionSelectionView.

userStories.title: Gesture Controls
userStories.description: As a user, I want to customize what gestures do on the notch.
acceptanceCriteria: Horizontal swipe: configurable (skip track, switch widget, none)
Vertical swipe down: configurable (expand, show widgets, none)
Long press: configurable (show settings, show widget picker, none)
userStories.notes: Added GestureSettings.swift with configurable actions. NotchPanel supports horizontal/vertical swipe and long press with UserDefaults-backed preferences.

userStories.title: Adjustable Expanded Size & Padding
userStories.description: As a user, I want to control the expanded notch dimensions.
userStories.notes: Added expandedHeight (150-400pt) and contentPadding (8-32pt) to NotchState. Updated ScreenDetector and NotchWindowManager.

userStories.title: Settings Window Revamp
userStories.description: As a user, I want a comprehensive tabbed settings window to configure all NotchNook features.
acceptanceCriteria: Tabbed interface: General, Appearance, Media, HUD, Widgets, Drop Actions
General: activation trigger, launch at login, expanded size sliders
Appearance: theme picker (from US-004), corner radius
userStories.notes: Added Widgets tab, expanded size sliders, gesture pickers to General. 6-tab settings: General, Appearance, HUD, Widgets, Context, Drop Actions.

userStories.title: Context-Aware Widget Switching
userStories.description: As a user, I want the notch to automatically show relevant widgets based on context.
acceptanceCriteria: Media app detection shows media widget automatically
Custom rules engine: condition -> widget assignment
Rules evaluated in priority order, first match wins
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1. ContextService + ContextRule model.

userStories.title: CPU & Memory Optimization
userStories.description: As a user, I want NotchNook to use minimal system resources.
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1.

userStories.title: Sleep/Wake & Display Hotplug Resilience
userStories.description: As a user, I want NotchNook to survive sleep/wake cycles and monitor changes.
userStories.notes: Implemented in v1. NotchWindowManager willSleep/didWake handlers.
